form-field-multiple-labels.description: Form field must not have multiple label elements

items.html: <form action="/Search/" method="post"><input type="text" name="SearchWords" size="20" maxlength="75" value=""><input type="submit" value="Go!"></form>
Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.
Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.</font>
A 'large' version is currently available but still waiting 'accreditation'.
• filled with 10 mmol nickel chloride solution containing sodium chloride 75 mmol
• the outside of each phantom has the words “NOSE” and “CHIN” etched into it as an aid to orienting the phantom for scanning, as if it were a head
• four matrices of holes, diameters: 0.8, 0.9, 1.0 and 1.1 mm
• spaces between the holes are equal to hole diameters
• two small containers with water and fat for water-fat shift evaluation
• 1 mm wide and 5 mm deep counter-descending slits on both sides

<video autoplay="" muted="" loop="">
     <source src="Pro-MRI-Medium2.mp4" type="video/mp4">
     <source src="Pro-MRI-Medium2.webm" type="video/webm">
     <source src="Pro-MRI-Medium2.3gp" type="video/3gp">
   </video>
• partial volume contribution of these sheets and filling solution produce contrasts: 1.4, 2.5, 3.6 and 5.1%
• each disc contains 10 groups of 3 holes arranged in spokes
• four sets of paired 45° wedges are located on both sides of the phantom. The lower pairs are 20 x 20 mm, and the upper ones are 30 x 30 mm.

table-duplicate-name.description: Tables should not have the same summary and caption

target-size.description: All touch targets must be 24px large, or leave sufficient space

td-headers-attr.description: Table cell headers attributes must refer to other <th> elements in the same table

th-has-data-cells.description: Table headers in a data table must refer to data cells

oobee-confusing-alt-text.description: Image alt text must not be vague or unhelpful.

oobee-accessible-label.description: Clickable elements must have accessible labels.

Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.
Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Pro-MRI - ACR accredited Medium MRI phantom.</font>
A 'large' version is currently available but still waiting 'accreditation'.
• filled with 10 mmol nickel chloride solution containing sodium chloride 75 mmol
• the outside of each phantom has the words “NOSE” and “CHIN” etched into it as an aid to orienting the phantom for scanning, as if it were a head
• four matrices of holes, diameters: 0.8, 0.9, 1.0 and 1.1 mm
• spaces between the holes are equal to hole diameters
• two small containers with water and fat for water-fat shift evaluation
• 1 mm wide and 5 mm deep counter-descending slits on both sides
